# Prospect theory

@kahneman1979 challenged Expected Utility Theory by introducing a new descriptive theory they called Prospect Theory that addresses the anomalies that we identified in the previous part.

Prospect theory has the following features:

- A value function that incorporates:
  - Reference dependence
  - Loss aversion
  - The reflection effect
- Probability weighting

I will address each of these features individually before combining them.
